title: Required package.json scripts (Project Setup)
description: README and CI MUST expose these script names. Implementations are in package.json.

dev.description: Vite dev server for local development.

preview.description: Serve dist/ (e.g. vite preview on 127.0.0.1:4173). Playwright + CI use this, not dev.

test:e2e.description: Playwright; runs against preview per playwright.config.
